title: DiscoveryResponse
description: Response payload from product discovery search with ranking and trust data.

sourcesUsed.description: List of connector sources that contributed results

confidence.description: Overall confidence score from the ranking pipeline (0-1)

strategyUsed.description: Name of the ranking strategy applied

uncertaintyAssessment.description: Uncertainty assessment from the AI service

queryProcessedAt.description: Timestamp when the query was processed
